summary: Phase 2 Twilio WhatsApp integration verified end-to-end: 3 backend booking scenarios (sent/skipped/failed) and 4 validation invariants pass; frontend e2e for checked and unchecked optin flows pass.
passed: POST /api/bookings optin=true + +919876543210 -> whatsapp_status='sent', whatsapp_error=null (Twilio actually called)
POST /api/bookings optin=false -> whatsapp_status='skipped', no Twilio call

POST /api/bookings optin=true + invalid phone 'abcd' -> booking created with whatsapp_status='failed' and whatsapp_error '21211: Unable to create record: The To number +91abcd is not a valid phone number.'
Past date -> 400, overlap -> 409, outside hours (22:00) -> 400, stylist not offering service -> 400
Step 4 Details: data-testid='whatsapp-optin-checkbox' present, checked by default, label text contains 'Send me a WhatsApp confirmation'
Confirmation screen with checkbox CHECKED shows data-testid='whatsapp-status' with text '✓ Confirmation sent to +919876543210 on WhatsApp.'
Confirmation screen with checkbox UNCHECKED hides whatsapp-status section entirely
notes: Test bookings (WA Test*, ETest*) cleaned up from MongoDB after each run. Twilio sender +919825221997 to recipient +919876543210 succeeded (sid logged).
